textByHashes.78689ad1fe4bd20136bedb3410fe4f06db2570c4: Why have you summoned us here?
textByHashes.5cec64c43aaad9db705fc72cef6742c56c4a3c1f: What is the meaning of this?
textByHashes.e0e821726ae6d620c8053ef4dfd075b8d5b20b1d: How can lying to your fellow gnomes be 'Good'?
textByHashes.9107251f87236c1e3504e6cb57e8e4ab1b8063dd: Enough! How can I trust a gnome who hides things from me?
textByHashes.1cfc5c9a9d44e57cc6b655a1d798fb2269c962ca: That is NOT how I rule.
textByHashes.5a9a862d1d07dd4c6007679d947e4622d5f82bea: Glouphrie. You are no longer my advisor. Leave this place.
